The '''''Reeko''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] with a [[Color/Legends|silver-green]] [[Hull/Legends|hull]] owned by [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] treasure hunter [[Suz Tanwa]]. She flew the ship to the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] where she made her first big break, discovering treasure left by her ancestor [[Suvam Tan]].
